untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of dominant cycle period, instantaneous trendline construction via dominant cycle removal, and smoothed price trendline generation. These are advanced signal processing techniques (spectral analysis, cycle decomposition, custom trendline fitting) that cannot be expressed using the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators do not include cycle analysis tools, custom detrending methods, or the ability to detect sawtooth pattern uniformity/erraticism. Implementation requires custom preprocessing unavailable in standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_11 is a sophisticated cycle-based trend detection method from J.F. Ehlers' work. It relies on: (1) Dominant cycle identification through phase uniformity analysis, (2) Instantaneous trendline derived from dominant cycle removal, (3) Smoothed price trendline comparison, (4) Sawtooth pattern monitoring. None of these computations can be replicated with standard technical indicators. A proper implementation would require custom cycle analysis code or external spectral analysis library integration.
